label: Designer handbags & luxury goods (SCAFFOLD — thin sources, uncalibrated; provisional/flagged only until Tier-1 + calibration land)

captureSlots.label: Heat stamp / blind stamp
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of the embossed maison heat stamp and date/blind stamp.

captureSlots.label: Full piece
captureSlots.guidance: Whole bag / item, square-on, even light, both faces.

captureSlots.label: Hardware macro
captureSlots.guidance: Macro of engraved hardware (lock, zipper pull, feet) showing brand marks.

captureSlots.label: Interior stamp / date code
captureSlots.guidance: Interior brand stamp and date code / serial.

captureSlots.label: Leather / material detail
captureSlots.guidance: Close detail of grain, stitching (stitch count, saddle stitch), and edge paint.

captureSlots.label: Base and feet
captureSlots.guidance: Base, feet and corners — wear consistent with age and use.

captureSlots.label: Card / dustbag / receipt
captureSlots.guidance: Authenticity card, receipt, dustbag and box.

redFlags.label: Counterfeit
redFlags.description: A replica presented as genuine — the super-fake case.

redFlags.label: Replaced hardware
redFlags.description: Non-genuine or swapped hardware inconsistent with the model and period.

redFlags.label: Rebuilt / restored
redFlags.description: Relined, repainted or rebuilt elements presented as original condition.

redFlags.label: Mismatched stamp
redFlags.description: Date code or blind stamp inconsistent with the model, hardware or material.

redFlags.label: Frankenbag
redFlags.description: Assembled from parts of different bags.

corpusSources.name: Maison archives / boutique confirmation (Hermès, Chanel, Louis Vuitton)
Auction archives (Christie's Handbags & Accessories, Bonhams, Rapp)
